SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces

Interface GossipReceiverCI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, GossipReceiverI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, Remote
All Known Implementing Classes:
GossipReceiverInboundPort
public interface GossipReceiverCI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, GossipReceiverI
The component interface GossipReceiverCI declares the signatures of the service offered by a component playing the receiver role in the gossip protocol.

Description

Invariants 

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-02-12

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    receive(GossipMessageI[] gossipMessages)
    receive an array of gossip messages from a sender.

  • Method Details

    • receive

      void receive(GossipMessageI[] gossipMessages) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: GossipReceiverI
      receive an array of gossip messages from a sender.

      Contract 

       pre    gossipMessages != null && gossipMessages.length > 0
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      receive in interface GossipReceiverI
      Parameters:
      gossipMessages - gossip messages received from the sender in the gossip protocol.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.

      • GossipReceiverI.receive(fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces.GossipMessageI[])
